steps.title: Factor the left side
steps.content: Notice that $$4x-32=4(x-8)$$ So the equation becomes $$4(x-8)=28$$

steps.title: Solve only for the requested expression
steps.content: Divide by $4$: $$x-8=7$$ The question asks for $x-8$, so you can stop here.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B — $7$ is correct. $28$ is the value of $4x-32$, not the value of $x-8$.
